module: Improving Chat Techniques for Better Engagement
objective: Advanced techniques to increase engagement and script success

follow_up.when: 3-4 minutes no response during sexual talk
examples: i want to see that sexy face of you while you touch yourself

give_him_ball.phrase: depends on how you want it to be done

visual_imagery: which of my sweet holes do you want?
do you want to see me bent over?
want to see what im wearing?

game_strategy.when: Fan interested but stuck transitioning to script
flow: have you heard about the carpenters game?
its easy... youll be the hammer so you can nail me hard
game_strategy.benefit: Dirty talk without immediate script pressure

authentic_openers.example: if you got nothing to do, maybe you can do me instead

hobby_sexualization.example: so i guess youre good with fingers

fail_conditions: Not following up during sexual talk
